compressed_prompt: write song lyrics on socio-economic issue, all lowercase, no commas
response:
in the city of dreams where the lights never fade
we walk the line between the haves and the have nots
a melody of struggle in the air we breathe
a symphony of hope in the hearts we hold

we sing of the battles fought in the streets so wide
the echoes of inequality in every stride
a chorus of the voiceless in the shadows cast
a ballad of resilience in the face of the past

the rhythm of the system plays a tune so cold
a melody of power in the hands of the bold
but we rise with a harmony that cannot be tamed
a symphony of change in the name of the game

in the verses of our lives we write a new refrain
a melody of unity to break the chain
a chorus of the people in the fight for fair
a symphony of justice in the songs we share

so let the music play as we march side by side
a melody of progress in the streets we stride
a symphony of hope in the hearts we hold
a ballad of tomorrow in the stories we unfold
